text.title: Distribution First Ideation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Distribution First Ideation end-to-end. Each step pins input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: check-applies-if
step.input: Engagement context + applies_if + skip_if lists from AGENTS.md.
step.action: Verify every applies_if predicate holds AND no skip_if condition triggers; on any failure, route to step 5 (skip).
step.decision-gate: If any applies_if fails OR any skip_if matches → step 5 (skip with reason).

step.name: gather-prerequisites
step.action: Collect every prerequisite artefact and attach its path/URL; halt if any is unreadable.
step.decision-gate: If any prerequisite is missing → surface 'needs-clarification' and stop.

step.name: draft-artefact
step.input: prerequisite_bundle + rules from content/01-core-rules.xml + decision tree from content/06-decision-tree.xml.
step.action: Apply rules, populate output_payload per templates, attach evidence per rule with source_type.

step.name: validate-output
step.action: Run validator; on failure, surface violations and reroute to step 3.
step.decision-gate: If validation fails twice consecutively → escalate to human reviewer.

step.name: commit-or-skip
step.action: Persist artefact to engagement log; if skipped, persist skip-record naming the failed precondition.
